<!-- indicator: tbl-0to4-hosp-asthma-gastor-om-pnu-rate -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: tbl-0to4-hosp-asthma-gastor-om-pnu-rate
#| tbl-cap: 'Asthma, Gastroenteritis, Otitis Media, and Pneumonia Hospitalizations, Rate per 10,000 Population 0–4 Years Old, 2020–2022'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_table_object
render_table_object(object_id="tbl-0to4-hosp-asthma-gastor-om-pnu-rate", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH)
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
from IPython.display import Markdown, display
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_source_callout_for_object
display(Markdown(render_source_callout_for_object("tbl-0to4-hosp-asthma-gastor-om-pnu-rate", CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH)))
```
